title: Claudine Trécourt

infobox.value: [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Claudine+Tr%C3%A9court%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Claudine+Tr%C3%A9court%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Claudine+Tr%C3%A9court%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Claudine+Tr%C3%A9court%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(December 2022)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

(born 1962) is a French [ski mountaineer](/wiki/Ski_mountaineer "Ski mountaineer"), high [mountain guide](/wiki/Mountain_guide "Mountain guide")[[1]](#cite_note-1) and mountain climber. She currently teaches [physics](/wiki/Physics "Physics") and sports.[[2]](#cite_note-2) In May 2007 she also took part in an expedition on the [Cho Oyu](/wiki/Cho_Oyu "Cho Oyu").[[3]](#cite_note-3)

[*C.N.S.A. 1999 - Top 25 femme*](http://www.ffme.fr/ski-alpinisme/classement/cnsa/1999/cn1999_t3.htm) [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20061128151237/http://www.ffme.fr/ski-alpinisme/classement/cnsa/1999/cn1999_t3.htm) November 28, 2006, at the [Wayback Machine](/wiki/Wayback_Machine "Wayback Machine")

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

French ski mountaineer (born 1962)

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | The topic of this article **may not meet Wikipedia's [general notability guideline](/wiki/Wikipedia:Notability "Wikipedia:Notability")**. Please help to demonstrate the notability of the topic by citing [reliable secondary sources](/wiki/Wikipedia:Reliable_sources "Wikipedia:Reliable sources") that are [independent](/wiki/Wikipedia:Independent_sources "Wikipedia:Independent sources") of the topic and provide significant coverage of it beyond a mere trivial mention. If notability cannot be shown, the article is likely to be [merged](/wiki/Wikipedia:Merging "Wikipedia:Merging"), [redirected](/wiki/Wikipedia:Redirect "Wikipedia:Redirect"), or [deleted](/wiki/Wikipedia:Deletion_policy "Wikipedia:Deletion policy"). *Find sources:* ["Claudine Trécourt"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Claudine+Tr%C3%A9court%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Claudine+Tr%C3%A9court%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Claudine+Tr%C3%A9court%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Claudine+Tr%C3%A9court%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Claudine+Tr%C3%A9court%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Claudine+Tr%C3%A9court%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(December 2022)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

**Claudine Trécourt** (born 1962) is a French [ski mountaineer](/wiki/Ski_mountaineer "Ski mountaineer"), high [mountain guide](/wiki/Mountain_guide "Mountain guide")[[1]](#cite_note-1) and mountain climber. She currently teaches [physics](/wiki/Physics "Physics") and sports.[[2]](#cite_note-2) In May 2007 she also took part in an expedition on the [Cho Oyu](/wiki/Cho_Oyu "Cho Oyu").[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Selected results

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Claudine_Tr%C3%A9court&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Selected results")]

### Ski mountaineering

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Claudine_Tr%C3%A9court&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Ski mountaineering")]

* 1991:
  + 1st, [Matterhorn](/wiki/Matterhorn "Matterhorn") ski marathon, [Zermatt](/wiki/Zermatt "Zermatt")[[4]](#cite_note-4)
* 1997:
  + 1st, French national ranking[[5]](#cite_note-5)
* 1998:
  + 1st, French national ranking[[6]](#cite_note-6)
  + 1st, Tour du Rutor (together with [Alexia Zuberer](/wiki/Alexia_Zuberer "Alexia Zuberer"))[[7]](#cite_note-7)
  + 2nd, [Patrouille des Glaciers](/wiki/Patrouille_des_Glaciers "Patrouille des Glaciers") (together with Alexia Zuberer and [Jana Heczková](/wiki/Jana_Heczkov%C3%A1 "Jana Heczková"))
* 1999:
  + 1st, French national ranking[[8]](#cite_note-8)

#### Pierra Menta

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Claudine_Tr%C3%A9court&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Pierra Menta")]

* 1988: 1st, together with her sister, Sylvie Trécourt
* 1989: 1st, together with Sylvie Trécourt
* 1990: 1st, together with Sylvie Trécourt
* 1991: 1st, together with Sylvie Trécourt
* 1992: 2nd, together with Sylvie Trécourt
* 1994: 1st, together with Sylvie Trécourt
* 1995: 2nd, together with Sylvie Trécourt
* 1997: 1st, together with Alexia Zuberer
* 1998: 1st, together with Alexia Zuberer
* 1999: 1st, together with Danièle Hacquard

### Climbing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Claudine_Tr%C3%A9court&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Climbing")]

* 1991:
  + 2nd, French Championship, [Briançon](/wiki/Brian%C3%A7on "Briançon")[[9]](#cite_note-9)

## References
